Customer **Jane Doe** (email: jane@example.com, tier: enterprise, status: active) has a closed ticket **TKT-109** related to a "Security audit request."

- Customer name, email, tier, and status.  
- Ticket ID (TKT-109), status, and issue description.  

This context provides the necessary data to fulfill the request.
